THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HELTON, DARNELL IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT ARROW CLAIMS MANAGEMENT INC-NO CALIFORNIA BRANCH HAILEY, VICKIE ELAINE STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT ARROW CLAIMS MANAGEMENT INC-NO CALIFORNIA BRANCH HAILEY, VICKIE ELAINE IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY CROSS DEFENDANT HELTON, DARNELL STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
PLAINTIFF'S CORRESPONDENCE TO JUDGE GIVEN TO NORA;
PLTFF FILING MOTION FOR CONSIDERATION,PAID $14.00 CASH,MAILED COPIES TO OTHER PARTY;TOLD TO WAIT AT LEAST 15 DAYS,GAVE FOLDER TO NORA.
PLFT'S REQUEST TO CORRECT OR VACATE JUDGMENT DENIED BY COMMISSIONER. NOTICED SENT TO ALL PARTIES.
